_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Design or integrate appropriate data backup capabilities into overall system designs, and ensure appropriate technical and procedural processes exist for secure system backups and protected storage of backup data.
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.463), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.460).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.495). Shared vocabulary: [data, storage]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, backup, backups, capabilities, design, designs] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, controls, environments, infrastructure, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.860, R=0.884). R exceeds P by 0.023 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 29 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (58.6%). The model interprets "Design or integrate appropriate data backup capabilities into overall system des" as logically implying aspects of "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.467 ≈ STS 0.495 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, storage] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [data, storage]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, backup, backups, capabilities, design, designs]. WIDAI-only: [compute, configure, controls, environments, infrastructure, maintain].
